response.justification: The candidate brings 20 years of broad engineering experience and genuine entrepreneurial initiative (founding GISCollective, open-source contributions), and their current role does touch AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks. However, the role demands a director-level individual contributor with deep, demonstrated AI/ML expertise, recognized cloud platform knowledge, and a track record of advising strategic customers at an executive level. The candidate's AI exposure is recent and narrow, their cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK in a supporting capacity, and there is no evidence of strategic advisory work, architectural leadership at scale, or the kind of recognized external AI expertise (published research, keynotes, built AI platforms) the role explicitly requires. The gap between senior hands-on engineer and principal AI strategist is substantial here.
strengths: 20 years of continuous engineering experience across web, embedded, mobile, and infrastructure — exceeds the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial track record: founded and sustained GISCollective as an open-source geo-data platform serving real NGO users over nearly a decade
Active knowledge-sharing through conference talks and multi-day workshops demonstrates communication and mentorship capability
concerns: AI expertise is nascent and recent (current role started April 2025); no demonstrated AI products, ML systems, or platform built with AI at meaningful scale
No evidence of cloud architecture depth or advisory experience — AWS CDK usage at Optilyz is incidental, not strategic cloud platform ownership
Career trajectory and titles remain at senior individual contributor level with no signal of director-level scope, executive stakeholder influence, or strategic customer advisory work
